text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Parcae... understands me. They take the data I input and guide me to
the correct answer. Adhering only to truth, they do what I want them
to and do it well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as I give them the right input, the output is absolute. The
perfect, all-encompassing, well-defined equation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But because of that... Parcae can't understand me. In their world of ones and zeros, the process of despair simply doesn't exist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on the lookout for a racer to scout, so I stop by practice. There, a
number of Umamusume who haven't made their debuts yet gather to
train.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O and Top Road are both so cool... I may never catch up, but...
I have to try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected of the prestigious Tracen Academy, all the students
have promise. As I watch them excitedly, I notice something out of
the corner of my eye...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beside me is an Umamusume observing the runners on the track. Her
serious gaze occasionally shifts to her laptop, where she seems to be
typing something.
choice_data_list: (What an intense stare. It's almost like...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gaze isn't fixed on the racers in front of her, or even her laptop
screen... They seem to be searching for something... desperately so.
...Tch!
Hmph...
choice_data_list: (Ah, I shouldn't have been staring like that.)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see that? Air Shakur seriously freaks me out. I can't believe she
glared at an adult like that...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
But isn't she, like, a genius or something? Even Teach said she's got the brains
and skills... It's just the way she does things that's off.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she's always out till just before curfew. I bet she's up to no good...
Maybe that's why she's so prickly... I don't know what goes on in her head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur... It looks like she's got quite the fearsome reputation, and
perhaps rightfully so. That uniquely fierce stare left quite the
impression on me.
Like. I. Said. I'm not doing anything, so what's the big deal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, as I'm returning to the school from a quick trip into town, I
spot an Umamusume being stopped by the police.

Every damn time, you stop me. And for what? It's not even that late...
Ah.

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text: Hm? You there... Do you know this girl?

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
So you're from the academy... Good. I'll hand you over to your
teacher now. No more wandering around so late at night, got it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Hand me over"? Way to treat me like a criminal. And based on
nothing but assumptions at that.

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! You're always in those net cafes till late. I'm just worried
you'll get wrapped up in something bad... You're so stubborn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something tells me that unless I say something, these two will just
keep bickering...
choice_data_list:
Sorry, I was the one who told her to wait there
for me.

Sorry, I was the one who told her to wait there
for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Police Officer
text_block_list.text:
...If that's the case, fine. However, you shouldn't leave minors
unattended for so long. As for you, if you're waiting for your teacher,
just say so!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Air Shakur back to the dorms after bidding the policeman good
night. She doesn't say a word to me the entire way back...
choice_data_list: Make sure you're not out too late, okay?
Make sure you're not out too late, okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That all you're gonna say? I was out till curfew, and I know my
reputation around school's not great. It's obvious you'd be suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Lemme guess, you just don't want to deal with this crap, right? In that
case, I wholeheartedly agree.
choice_data_list:
I just figured you had a good reason to be out
late.

I just figured you had a good reason to be out
late.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?
choice_data_list: You just seem... serious about racing.
You just seem... serious about racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The way she looked this afternoon tells me everything I need to
know. I can't imagine anyone with that stern gaze doing something
that could jeopardize her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead... I imagine she was simply looking for somewhere she can
concentrate in order to continue her work, whatever it is.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So you're not even going to investigate further? You're just letting me
go because of baseless impressions and feelings... You're no better
than that cop.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, everyone just sees what they want to see—mixing desires
into decisions... and your minds suffer for it. That’s why I chase the
truth... You're unreliable, unlike my partner.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... My PC. But they're more than just a machine, okay? They're
like another brain—a partner capable of giving me all the answers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Based on all the data I collect, they can give me the most efficient
regimen, a surefire strategy for scrimmages... and whatever else I
need.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As long as I don't mess up during data entry, they'll spit out the right
answer. And they give it to me straight too, none of that vague crap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But Parcae can only help those who want to help themselves. That's
why we work so well. I’m more than willing to follow the path they set
for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no duh. I made them myself after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Gross much?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I've upset her once again... So I decide to head back to my
room, reminding myself to mind my words and actions going forward.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, Shakur! You're finally baaack! U-um, uh... Are you... Um, weeell...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I was organizing some of my data. It's just easier to concentrate at a
cafe than here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And I thought I told you, you don't have to wait up for me. The entire
reason I leave is so you... Whatever, let's just sleep. We've gotta be
up early.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okayyy... Um, that reminds me... Shakur, a trainer is going to observe
your training tomorrow, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They want to see what I can do. I mean, I'll run, but... I know it's going
to end the same as always. It's not even worth running a simulation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Either way, it doesn't concern you. I'm turning off the light.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I knew it. The answer didn't change.
C’ｍon, Parcae...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Parcae... You were born of my obsession with the Twinkle Series.
Everything from your OS to the applications you use—I made you
myself.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Based on your analysis, I should be debuting soon. My physical
condition is improving as predicted. However...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (That number hasn't changed. Which makes sense, since the code is right. That number is absolute.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(So why do I... keep redoing it? Analysis? Verification? Desperation?
What is it...)
